# Noesis Vault Index

Generated automatically by omp-noesis.

## Decision

```dataview
TABLE id, pushedAt, projectPath
FROM ".obsidian/noesis/decision"
SORT pushedAt DESC
```

TABLE id, pushedAt, projectPath
